settings.title: Tallow Benefits
settings.content:
Tallow supplies complete nutrition directly to the skin, resulting in optimal skin health, and includes vitamins A, D, E, K, B12 and more.

Vitamin A is renowned for its ability to smooth wrinkles, lighten sunspots, and calm acne. With regular use of our tallow balm, you can achieve a youthful complexion and say goodbye to pesky blemishes. Additionally, vitamin A helps balance oil production, resulting in a radiant and well-hydrated skin.

Vitamin D supports cell growth and repair while nourishing your skin from within.

Vitamin E provides antioxidant protection against free radicals and helps maintain youthful-looking skin.

Vitamin K aids in reducing dark circles and under-eye puffiness, giving you a refreshed appearance.

Vitamin B12 plays a crucial role in skin health by providing essential nutrients for collagen production and by helping to maintain the skin's natural moisture balance. Vitamin B12 also helps to promote healthy cell growth, which can help to reduce the appearance of wrinkles and other signs of aging.

Our Tallow Balm is all natural, 100% organic, and is rendered from the fat of 100% grass fed cows, making it completely edible! (Although we recommend applying the balm directly to the skin).

settings.title: Shipping and Return
settings.content:
At White Sparrow, each item is carefully handcrafted in small batches with quality and tradition in mind. Because many of our products are used on the skin or body, we do not accept returns or exchanges for hygienic and safety reasons.

Final Sale

All purchases are considered final sale. We do not offer returns or exchanges on opened, used, or unwanted items.

Subscription Policy

By choosing a subscription option at checkout, you agree to be automatically billed at the selected frequency (e.g., every 30, 60, or 90 days). Subscriptions can be managed or canceled at any time through your customer account portal—no minimum commitment required.

Changes or cancellations must be made at least 24 hours before your next renewal to avoid being charged for the upcoming order.

Discounts and offers applied to your initial order will remain valid for all active subscription renewals unless otherwise stated. Shipping rates and taxes apply to each recurring shipment.

For questions or help managing your subscription, please contact hello@whitesparrowfarmacy.com.

Damaged or Defective Items

If your item arrives damaged or defective, please contact us within 7 days of delivery so we can make it right.

To request a replacement or refund:

  • Email hello@whitesparrowfarmacy.com
  • Include your order number, a description of the issue, and clear photos of the item and its packaging

If approved, we may offer a replacement or a refund to your original payment method. Refunds may take several business days to appear, depending on your provider.

Return Shipping

If a return is authorized, the customer is responsible for return shipping costs unless the item was incorrect or damaged upon arrival. Items must be returned in their original, unused condition and packaging.

Gift Orders

If you received a gift item that arrived damaged, we can offer store credit or a replacement to the original gift recipient.

settings.title: FAQs
settings.content:
Q: Can you use the tallow balm on both face and body?

A: Yes! Our tallow balms are meant to be used on face and body. It's a nourishing and hydrating solution that can be applied to any part of your skin for a natural and healthy glow.

 

Q: What are the main benefits of using tallow balm?

A: Tallow balm is rich in nutrients like vitamins A, D, E, K, and B12 making it an excellent choice for facial care. It deeply moisturizes, promotes skin elasticity, and can help soothe and balance various skin types.

 

Q: Is the tallow balm safe for sensitive skin?

A: Yes, our tallow balm is crafted with care, and many users with sensitive skin find it gentle and nourishing. However, we recommend the unscented tallow for those with sensitive skin or known allergies to essential oils.  You should also patch test before regular use, especially if you have known skin sensitivities.

 

Q: How often should I apply tallow balm to see results?

A: The frequency of application depends on your individual skin needs. For best results, we recommend using our tallow balm daily, either in the morning, evening, or both, depending on your skincare routine.

 

Q: Can tallow balm be used as a natural remedy for certain skin conditions?

A: Tallow balm is known for its nourishing properties, and can aid with many skin conditions including eczema, psoriasis, and diaper rash.  We advise consulting with a healthcare professional for your specific skin conditions.

 

Q: Can I use tallow balm as a moisturizer for dry skin?

A: Absolutely! Tallow balm is highly moisturizing and can be an effective solution for dry or chapped skin. Its natural emollient properties help lock in moisture, leaving your skin feeling soft and hydrated.

 

Q: Are your tallow balms allergen-free?

A: While our tallow balms are crafted with high-quality and minimal ingredients, it's important to note that individual sensitivities may vary. We recommend checking the product's ingredient list to ensure it does not contain any components you may be allergic to. If you have specific allergies, we advise performing a patch test before widespread use to ensure compatibility with your skin.

The ingredients of our tallow balms are: Organic Tallow, organic olive oil, organic honey, organic beeswax, and some of our tallows contain various essential oils listed on their labels.

 

Q: What makes your tallow balms organic?

A: Our tallow balms are crafted using organic tallow sourced from ethically raised animals. Additionally, we use organic and natural ingredients in our formulations, ensuring a product that is free from synthetic chemicals and pesticides.

 

Q: Are there any synthetic fragrances in your organic tallow balms?

A: No, our organic tallow balms are free from synthetic fragrances. We believe in providing a pure and natural skincare experience, and any scent in our products comes from natural sources like essential oils.

 

Q: Do your organic tallow balms contain any preservatives?

A: No, our organic tallow balms are free from synthetic preservatives. We use natural ingredients with inherent preservative properties to maintain the freshness and quality of our products.
